data.title: The caret in `MeshLibrary`'s name field jumps back to the beginning of the field
HTML5: Add support for `Input.vibrate_handheld()`
Resolve inconsistent str() errors
Slider loses click hold if mouse moves outside of input box
Fix SkeletonRenamer & TrackOrganizer in ImporterRetarget for non bone animations such as BlendShape
Remove unintended string copies
Generate errors for getters of untyped variables returning nothing
inconsistency in the error returned by the editor when calling str without arguments
`Vector4`, `Vector4i` and `Projection` for Csharp
GDScript 2.0: Cannot parse match with typeof() and enum constants from other script
[4.0a12] Editing Tileset Causes Crash to desktop
Rename and unify notation for spherical interpolation
Allow to set custom feature tags for testing
Fix Label3D not updated on window resize.
Restructure environment in render implementation
Improve EditorInspector wide mode and make Editor Settings, Project Settings, and Import Defaults use wide mode
Allow setting a window stretch scale below 1.0 in the project settings
Add a Window visibility toggle button to the Scene tree
The caret in `MeshLibrary`'s name field jumps back to the beginning of the field

doc: Fix relative paths in `make_rst.py` generated comment
Visual shader connections are very hard to work with
Fix incorrect conversion of default value for mat4 uniform in shaders
Add a check to prevent duplicating connections in visual shader

Improve the autogenerated note in RST docs for class reference

Color's alpha is set to one when setting `h`, `s`, or `v`.
Fix `FOG` built-in in spatial/fragment shader
Add some missing Vector4 methods

Group properties of `Generic6DOFJoint` slightly better
Initialize default values for viewports in rendering server.

Fix `cubic_slerp()`
Make tooltips be shown at different directions if there's not enough space
Reduce contrast in inspector array element backgrounds

Disable animation track optimizer by default

Portals - Allow more logging to be disabled

Rooms and Portal system crashes after freeing a room and re-converting room graph
Expose `VisualServer.viewport_set_use_32_bpc_depth()` to the scripting API

[3.x, X11] Do case-insensitive search for pen inversion detection

[3.x] Fix documentation for `print_debug`
